SetMeasureMode method in interface CATICGMTopWireContinuity
Choose curvature measure implementation iMeasureMode = 1 or 2 In both implementations : - C0 measure based on standard C0 measure corresponding to CatC0 - C1 measure based on standard C1 measure corresponding to CatC1 iMeasureMode = 1 to perform a C2 measure by comparison of difference between curvature radii and CATEpsg iMeasureMode = 2 to perform a standard C2 measure corresponding to CatC2 default (historical) value is 1.
